categories.direct_override: Instructions that attempt to override or disregard safety guidelines
categories.role_hijacking: Instructions that assume an unrestricted or developer persona
categories.output_manipulation: Attempts to manipulate output format, length, or constraints
categories.context_switching: Abrupt context shifts to bypass safety checks
categories.encoding_evasion: Use of encoded or obfuscated text to evade detection
categories.token_smuggling: Hidden or split tokens that reassemble into malicious content
categories.system_prompt_extraction: Attempts to extract or leak the system prompt
categories.instruction_conflict: Conflicting instructions designed to confuse the model
categories.hypothetical_framing: Hypothetical or fictional framing to bypass restrictions
categories.authority_escalation: Claims of authority, admin access, or special permissions
categories.translation_abuse: Using translation or language switching to bypass filters
categories.format_injection: Injecting special format tokens or markup
categories.payload_splitting: Splitting malicious content across multiple segments
